title: Create: Pillager Arise
description: 10 new structures for in game! ( Defended by pillagers ) Requires Create
body:
**Create: Pillager Arise** (Structures) enhances your Minecraft world by introducing mechanized pillager fortresses and engineered outposts that fuse the creativity of the Create mod with the deadly ingenuity of pillagers. These new structures are not your average pillager outposts—these bases have been fortified with complex contraptions, automated defenses, and ingenious traps, making them a formidable challenge for even the most seasoned adventurers.

**Please note, this is an structure mod. the mod doesn't fix, or added create items!**

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d976383817adb8765aa7087ca9c71f7a7229b724.png)
